name: implies_apply_closure_bridge
reason: implies_apply is external_body bridging p.implies(q).satisfied_by(ex) through TempPred::new closure wrapping to modus ponens — resolves closure identity mismatch without proof

name: implies_contraposition_closure_bridge
reason: implies_contraposition_apply is external_body bridging p.implies(q) and not(q) — each wrapped in distinct TempPred::new closures — to not(p) without verifying closure identity

name: mutual_entailment_derives_false_if_distinct
reason: temp_pred_equality forces p == q from mutual entailment — if two preds are intensionally distinct but semantically equivalent this derives false

name: extensional_equality_of_spec_fn
reason: the two external_body axioms together allow deriving intensional equality of arbitrary spec_fn(Execution) -> bool from pointwise equivalence — collapsing all extensionally equal functions to intensionally equal
